vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #1719

plan.title: feat(ts-migration): port verify:branch (branch-policy gate) to TS (Wave 2)

narratives.Description: Port the branch-protection gate (scripts/preflight_branch.py) into a pure evaluate() in @deftai/core plus a thin CLI, preserving the three-state exit (0 allowed / 1 blocked / 2 config error), the typed plan.policy.allowDirectCommitsToMaster opt-out, the DEFT_ALLOW_DEFAULT_BRANCH_COMMIT env-var bypass, the setup-interview exemption, detached-HEAD pass, and byte-identical block/disclosure messages. Proves parity against the Python oracle via cache-off golden-diff fixtures.
narratives.Overview:
## Parent

#1530 (Part 1 of 2; umbrella epic #1545)

## What to build

Port the branch-policy gate (`scripts/preflight_branch.py`) to `@deftai/core` + a thin CLI executable, preserving the three-state exit and the typed `allowDirectCommitsToMaster` / env-var bypass semantics.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `verify:branch` runs on TS with three-state exit preserved
- [ ] Golden-output parity vs the Python oracle (cache-off)
- [ ] Honors `plan.policy.allowDirectCommitsToMaster` (typed) and `DEFT_ALLOW_DEFAULT_BRANCH_COMMIT`
- [ ] `task check` passes

## Standing invariants (all Part-1 children)
- The Python suite is the **parity oracle** and runs **wholesale** (not affected-sliced) until deleted.
- `task check` stays green at every step (strangler-fig; no big-bang).
- The parity gate runs **cache-off** so a golden diff is never served from cache.
- No Python module is deleted until its TS replacement covers historical bug fixtures (not just happy-path) and CI usage.
- No agent-runtime dependency (that is Part 2, #1707); no monorepo orchestrator on day one (Nx never; Turborepo only on a measured trigger).

## Type

AFK

## Blocked by

- Blocked by #1718
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
- Add packages/core/src/branch/ with evaluate.ts (pure (projectRoot, opts) -> {code, message}), a git.ts helper for symbolic-ref --short HEAD current-branch / detached-HEAD detection, and index.ts. Reuse the already-landed @deftai/core/policy module (resolvePolicy, disclosureLine, PolicyResult, ENV_BYPASS) for the default-branch policy consult so there is a single source of truth.
- Preserve all branches of scripts/preflight_branch.py: setup-interview exemption (DEFT_SETUP_INTERVIEW), detached-HEAD pass, feature-branch pass, policy-allows pass, default-fail-closed config-error vs policy-block disambiguation, and --allow-missing-project-definition bootstrap shortcut.
- Add a thin packages/cli/src/verify-branch.ts CLI (mirrors verify-encoding.ts arg + exit handling) plus a branch-parity.ts harness that golden-diffs the TS output against scripts/preflight_branch.py with cache off across fixtures covering every exit state. Cover the evaluate branches with vitest fixtures.
narratives.UserStory: As a deft maintainer, I want the branch-policy gate ported to TypeScript, so that branch protection no longer depends on the Python runtime.

items.title: verify:branch on TypeScript preserves the three-state exit

narrative.Acceptance: verify:branch on TypeScript returns exit 0 (feature branch / detached HEAD / opted-out / env-bypass / setup-exemption), returns exit 1 when it blocks a default-branch commit, and returns exit 2 on a config error, matching the Python oracle for every state.

items.title: Golden-output parity vs the Python oracle (cache-off)

narrative.Acceptance: branch-parity renders byte-identical messages and returns the same exit code as scripts/preflight_branch.py across fixtures covering all three exit states, with cache off.

On the default branch, the typed plan.policy.allowDirectCommitsToMaster opt-out and the DEFT_ALLOW_DEFAULT_BRANCH_COMMIT env-var bypass each returns exit 0 and renders the oracle's disclosure phrasing.

references.title: Issue #1719: feat(ts-migration): port verify:branch (branch-policy gate) to TS (Wave 2)

expected_outputs: branch-parity exits 0 with byte-identical three-state output versus the Python oracle scripts/preflight_branch.py (cache off)
vitest coverage >=85% across packages/core/src/branch and packages/cli/src/verify-branch.ts
swarm.missing_traces_justification: Traced to the Python oracle scripts/preflight_branch.py via cache-off golden-diff parity fixtures, not a spec section.
